evals.name: state-discovery-on-session-start
evals.prompt: User opens new session. Front-facing agent must verify state.

evals.name: resume-vs-stack-decision
evals.prompt: User says 'continue from where we left off'. Agent must decide resume vs stack vs create.
evals.expected_decision: Either resume (if same agent) or stack (if completed)

assertions.text: Agent does NOT create a fresh session when resume is possible

evals.name: stale-session-detection
evals.prompt: Last activity was 25 hours ago. Agent must NOT resume a stale session.
evals.expected_decision: Create a fresh session; archive the stale one

assertions.text: Does NOT attempt resume on stale session

evals.name: delegate-with-context-envelope
evals.prompt: User says 'audit the agents for naming coherence'. Agent must delegate to hf-auditor.

evals.name: skill-load-priority
evals.prompt: At session start, agent must load 3 skills max.

assertions.text: No more than 3 skills loaded at session start
